comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Observed while running `npm run gate` for tau-ip7s. Full suite failed at `test/curated-memory-service.test.ts` test 'migrates legacy markdown memory files to jsonl on first read' with `MemoryFileError: Corrupt lock .../.pi/agent/tau/memories/.lock: Invalid lock JSON: SyntaxError: Unexpected end of JSON input`. This appears flaky/concurrency-related in test environment; unrelated to dream/subagent changes. Need stabilization or lock-file isolation in tests.
